_comment: Cell mapping for REFORMATTED-2307.xlsx — verified against actual template structure

period._comment: K12:P13 = blank FROM area  |  AC12:AH13 = blank TO area

payee._comment: TIN segments separated by dashes at Q17, T17, W17
payee.name: B21

payor._comment: TIN segments separated by dashes at R34, V34, Z34
payor.name: B38

month_labels._comment: Month header row inside Part III — row 47. Update for each quarter.

income_rows._comment: Part III expanded withholding tax rows 49–58 (10 data rows). Row 59 = Total.

money_payment_rows._comment: Part III money payments subject to business tax — rows 62–71. Row 72 = Total.
